chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-199 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on CMA 607/24 2.For hearing of main case 17-10-2024 Mr. Asadullah Arbani, Advocate along with petitioners. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, AAG and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur, SIP Amanullah of P.S, A-section, Sukkur, ASI Muhammad Sharif of P.S, Pano Akil and Khalid Ahmed of P.S, C-section, Sukkur. **** Official respondents No.2,3,4&6 file statements, taken on record and copies whereof are provided to counsel for petitioners. They submit hat no harassment is cased to the petitioners nor they intend to do so in future. In view of such statements, counsel for petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents, particularly respondent No.5/P.S, Adilpur in whose jurisdiction petitioners reside, to provide legal protection to the petitioners, as when they needed. JUDGE Ahmad
